# PlayToneAction.Tone.single

**Case**

A person entered a digit.

## Declaration

```swift
case single
```

## Keypad tones

- **PlayToneAction.Tone.hardPause**: A person entered a hard pause.
- **PlayToneAction.Tone.softPause**: A person entered a soft pause.

items.description: A person entered a hard pause.
